name: godot-skills
description: A collection of Godot 4 skills for Claude Code (C# and GDScript both first-class) — engine quirks, UI-as-tscn, version-aware API lookup, asset generation, headless QA, scaffolding, and GDScript web/mobile/portrait-pet conventions.

plugins.name: godot
plugins.description: Bundle of Godot 4 skills (C# and GDScript both first-class): GDScript web/mobile export and portrait-pet conventions, engine quirks, UI authoring, version-aware API lookup, asset generation, scaffolding, scene building, and headless visual QA.
